title: selaginella flabellum
intro: Selaginella flabellum, also known as the fan-leaved spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in treating various health issues such as wound healing, fever reduction, and skin infections. The health benefits of Selaginella flabellum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
